LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS WILD SIDE WEST, BILLIE HAYES, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE PATRICIA ANN RAMSEYER LIVING TRUST D.B.A. WILD SIDE WEST, DONNA ROBERTS, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE NANCY J. WHITE LIVING TRUST'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (AS CORRECTED) - DEFENDANTS MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO RECORD AN INSTRUMENT IN ACCORDANCE WITH CAPA. CC 987(H)(1). MOREOVER, PLAINTIFF'S EXPERT'S DECLARATION DOES NOT SUFFICIENTLY EXPLAIN HOW REMOVING PIPES, WINDOWS AND SIDING WOULD NOT CAUSE SUBSTANTIAL DEFACEMENT OF THE BUILDING. EVEN IF THE COURT ACCEPTED THIS EXPERT'S DECLARATION IN TOTO, THIS COURT FINDS THAT NO REASONABLE TRIER OF FACT COULD RULE IN PLAINTIFF'S FAVOR ON A VIOLATION OF CC 987. IN ADDITION, THE COURT RULED ON DEFENDANTS OBJECTIONS TO PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE, SUSTAINED IN PART & OVERRULED IN PART, ORDER SIGNED. PREVAILING PARTY (MS. KRMPOTIC) TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: MITCH LYON, CSR #6840

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT KAREN SORUM'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION (CCP SECTION 437c).

APPEARANCES: Caroline N. Valentino, Esq. of Haims, Valentino, LLP 510/835-0500 for pltf & opposing party; J. Stephanie Krmpotic, Esq. of Low, Ball & Lynch 981-6630 for defts WILD SIDE WEST, BILLIE HAYES, individually and as TRUSTEE OF THE PATRICIA ANN RAMSEYER LIVING TRUST d.b.a. WILD SIDE WEST, DONNA ROBERTS, individually and as TRUSTEE OF THE NANCY J. WHITE LIVING TRUST; Marc L. Lichtenberg, Esq. of Law Office of Marc Lichtenberg 707/637-5373 for deft & moving party Karen Sorum.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN. AN AGENT IS NOT EXONERATED FROM LIABILITY MERELY BECAUSE THE PRINCIPAL IS ALSO LIABLE. PERKINS V. BLAUTH (1912) 163 CAL. 782, 787. PREVAILING PARTY (Ms. Valentino) TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS WILD SIDE WEST, BILLIE HAYES, individually and as TRUSTEE OF THE PATRICIA ANN RAMSEYER LIVING TRUST d.b.a. WILD SIDE WEST, DONNA ROBERTS, individually and as TRUSTEE OF THE NANCY J. WHITE LIVING TRUST'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.

APPEARANCES: Caroline N. Valentino, Esq. of Haims, Valentino, LLP 510/835-0500 for pltf & opposing party; J. Stephanie Krmpotic, Esq. of Low, Ball & Lynch 981-6630 for defts & moving parties WILD SIDE WEST, BILLIE HAYES, individually and as TRUSTEE OF THE PATRICIA ANN RAMSEYER LIVING TRUST d.b.a. WILD SIDE WEST, DONNA ROBERTS, individually and as TRUSTEE OF THE NANCY J. WHITE LIVING TRUST; Marc L. Lichtenberg, Esq. of Law Office of Marc Lichtenberg 707/637-5373 for deft Karen Sorum.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (as corrected) - DEFENDANTS MOTION FOR SUMMARY adjudication IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO RECORD AN INSTRUMENT IN ACCORDANCE WITH CAPA. CC 987(h)(1). MOREOVER, PLAINTIFF'S EXPERT'S DECLARATION DOES NOT SUFFICIENTLY EXPLAIN HOW REMOVING PIPES, WINDOWS AND SIDING WOULD NOT CAUSE SUBSTANTIAL DEFACEMENT OF THE BUILDING. EVEN IF THE COURT ACCEPTED THIS EXPERT'S DECLARATION IN TOTO, THIS COURT FINDS THAT NO REASONABLE TRIER OF FACT COULD RULE IN PLAINTIFF'S FAVOR ON A VIOLATION OF CC 987.
In addition, the Court ruled on defendants objections to plaintiff's evidence, sustained in part & overruled in part, order signed. PREVAILING PARTY (Ms. Krmpotic) TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840
